text.title: Side-Project Financial Runway Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Side-Project Financial Runway output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: burn excludes major categories (taxes, health, savings)
no stress test for flat or declining MRR

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: burn_personal populated with a typed value
burn_business populated with a typed value
savings_buffer populated with a typed value
mrr_current populated with a typed value
mrr_3mo_growth_pct populated with a typed value
leave_job_trigger populated with a typed value
geo_arbitrage_scenario populated with a typed value
stress_tests populated with a typed value
review_quarter populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
